common.noMatches: Wax isku mid ah lama helin

keys.backupCreated: Keydka furaha la sameeyey oo la soo dejiyey ✓
keys.restored: Keydka furaha dib loo soo celiyey ✓ Furayaasha lagu rakibay qalabkan
keys.noBackup: Ma jiro keyd sir ah oo u jira akoontigan

keySetup.title: Dejiso furayaasha qalabkaaga
keySetup.description: Qalabkan ma haysto furahaaga gaarka ah weli. Soo deji keyd sir ah oo ay ilaalinayso erayga sirta ah, ama samee furayaal cusub (waad awoodi doontaa inaad akhrido fariimaha cusub hadda ka dib).
keySetup.chooseFile: Dooro fayl oo geli erayga sirta ah.
keySetup.imported: Furaha gaarka ah waxaa loo soo dejiyey qalabkan. Hadda waad akhriyi kartaa fariimaha hore.
keySetup.enterPassword: Geli erayga sirta ah ee akoontigaaga si aan u keydinno furayaashaaga si ammaan ah.

auth.headline: Farriimaha ammaanka ah ee qof kasta, meel kasta
auth.description: Qarsoodi dhammaad-ilaa-dhammaad ah, tarjumaad 100+ luqadood, fariimo baaba’aya, iyo wicitaano cod/muuqaal.

feature.encryption: Qarsoodi dhammaad-ilaa-dhammaad ah oo ah mid caadi ah
feature.translation: Tarjumaad farriin ah oo smart ah oo ku dhex jirta
feature.translate: Tarjumaad farriin ah oo smart ah oo ku dhex jirta

hero.line1: Farriimaha ammaanka ah ee qof kasta, meel kasta — oo leh
hero.sub: Hel lambar taleefan ammaan ah oo bilaash ah si aad u wacdo oo u dirto farriimo adduunka oo dhan iyadoo la adeegsanayo Wi-Fi ama xog. Ku raaxayso qarsoodi dhammaad-ilaa-dhammaad ah, fariimo baaba’aya, iyo wicitaano cod/muuqaal HD — oo ay la socdaan qalabyo ku dhex jira oo kaa caawinaya inaad xiriirka ilaalisid xuduudaha dhexdooda.
hero.freeNote: Wicitaannada iyo farriimaha aasaasiga ah waa bilaash. AI horumarsan iyo astaamo lacag-bixineed ayaa u baahan casriyeyn.

feat.encryption: Qarsoodi dhammaad-ilaa-dhammaad ah, had iyo jeer on

auth.desktopTip: Desktop-ka? Sawir taleefankaaga si aad u hesho app-ka.
auth.scanHelper: Desktop-ka? Sawir taleefankaaga si aad u hesho app-ka.
auth.subhead: Farriimo asturan, qarsoon, oo la turjumay — markiiba.
auth.tip: Talo: Isticmaal akoon isku mid ah web iyo mobile. Farriimahaagu way isku xidhan yihiin.
auth.scanHint: Sawir si aad u soo dejiso app-ka ama u fur browser-kaaga.

registration.passwordDescription: Ugu yaraan 6 xaraf. Isticmaal eray sir ah oo xoog badan oo gaar ah.
registration.smsConsent: Markaad samayso akoon, waxaad ogolaatay inaad hesho ogeysiisyo SMS ah oo la xidhiidha hawshaada Chatforia (sida farriimaha uga yimaada isticmaalayaasha kale). Qiimaha farriinta & xogta ayaa laga yaabaa inay khusayso. Waad joojin kartaa wakhti kasta Settings.

auth.addRecipient: Ku dar qof la xidhiidhinayo kor si aad u bilowdo…
auth.oneRecipient: Fadlan geli hal qof la xidhiidhinayo hadda.
auth.enterValidRecipient: Geli magac xidhiidh la xidhiidha ama lambar taleefan.
auth.sendFailed: Diriddu way fashilantay. Hubi console si aad u aragto faahfaahin.

home.title: Guriga
home.subheader: Dir farriin si aad u bilowdo sheekaysi.
home.sendTooltipEmpty: Qor farriin si aad u dirto

chat.selectPrompt: Dooro qoraal ama qol sheekaysi si aad u bilowdo sheekaysi
chat.emptySubtitle: Dir farriin si aad u bilowdo sheekaysi.
chat.blockConfirm: Xannib {{name}}? Ma heli doontid farriimo iyaga ka yimaada.
chat.blockError: Lama go'aamin karin isticmaale la xannibo.
chat.blockFailed: Xannibidu way fashilantay (backend lama xidhin weli).
chat.unlockToView: Fur furahaaga si aad u aragto farriintan

messageInput.freeLimit: Xadka qorshaha bilaashka ah: si otomaatig ah u tirtir ilaa 1 maalin. La xidhay 1d.
messageInput.premiumLimit: Ugu badnaan tirtir otomaatig ah ee Premium waa 30 maalmood. La xidhay 30d.
messageInput.nothingToSend: Qor farriin ama ku lifaaq fayl si aad u dirto.
messageInput.encryptionFailed: Qarsoodintu way fashilantay. Farriinta lama dirin.
messageInput.typeToSend: Qor farriin si aad u dirto
messageInput.caption: Qoraal sharrax ah (ikhtiyaari)

errors.attachmentTooLarge: Lifaaqu aad buu u weyn yahay. Isku day fayl yar.
errors.rateLimit: Aad baad u diraysaa farriimo si degdeg ah. Fadlan yara gaabis.
errors.validation: Qalad xaqiijin. Fadlan hubi farriintaada oo isku day mar kale.
errors.failedToSend: Diriddu way fashilantay. Waad isku dayi kartaa xumbada fashilantay.

contactList.couldNotStart: Lama bilaabi karin sheekaysiga. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
contactList.startFailed: Bilaabidda sheekaysigu way fashilantay. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
contactList.deleteFailed: Tirtiridda xidhiidhku way fashilantay. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
contactList.updateAliasFailed: Cusboonaysiinta alias way fashilantay. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
contactList.loadFailed: Ku guuldareystay in la soo raro xidhiidhada. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
contactList.callStarted: Loo wacayo lambarkan iyadoo la adeegsanayo lambarkaaga Chatforia…
contactList.callFailed: Wicitaanku way fashilantay. Fadlan isku day mar kale.

startChatModal.title: Bilow sheekaysi
startChatModal.searchPlaceholder: Raadi magac, magaca isticmaalaha, ama lambar taleefan
startChatModal.noRecentInteractions: Weli ma jiraan is dhexgal dhowaan ah.

addContactModal.title: Ku dar xidhiidh
addContactModal.enterPhoneOrUsername: Geli lambar taleefan ama magaca isticmaalaha.
addContactModal.cannotAddSelf: Ma ku dari kartid naftaada xidhiidh ahaan.

sidebar.errorLoading: Ku guuldareystay in la soo raro sheekaysiyada
sidebar.loginPrompt: Gal si aad u tafatirto dejintaada.

mediaGallery.noMediaCached: Weli ma jiro warbaahin ku kaydsan qalabkan.

status.postFailed: Ku guuldareystay in la dhigo xaaladda

voicemail.errorLoading: Ku guuldareystay in la soo raro voicemail.
voicemail.deleteError: Ku guuldareystay in la tirtiro voicemail.

profile.title: Profile Isticmaale
profile.mustLogin: Waa inaad saxiixataa si aad u aragto dejinta.
profile.autoTranslate: Si otomaatig ah u turjun farriimaha
profile.showOriginalWithTranslation: Muuji asalka iyo farriimaha la turjumay
profile.showOriginalAndTranslation: Muuji asalka oo ay la socoto tarjumaadda
profile.autoDeleteSeconds: Ilbiriqsiyo ilaa si otomaatig ah loo tirtiro
profile.avatarError: Ku guuldareystay in la soo raro avatar
profile.noPrivateKey: Ma jiro furaha gaarka ah ee qalabkan si loo dhoofiyo.
profile.setBackupPassword: Deji eray sir ah si aad u qariso keydkaaga:
profile.backupDownloaded: Keyd sir ah la soo dejiyey.
profile.enterBackupPassword: Geli erayga sirta ah ee keydkan:
profile.importSuccess: Furaha gaarka ah la soo dejiyey qalabkan.
profile.importFailed: Ku guuldareystay in la soo dejiyo furaha (eray sir ah khalad ah ama fayl kharriban).
profile.keysRotated: Furayaal cusub la sameeyey oo furaha dadweynaha la soo raray.
profile.rotateFailed: Ku guuldareystay in la wareejiyo furayaasha.
profile.keyDisclaimer: Furahaaga gaarka ah waligiis kama baxo qalabkan. Dhoofi koobi sir ah si aad ugu soo celiso qalab kale.
profile.themeFreeNotice: Waxaad ku jirtaa Bilaash — isticmaal xulashooyinka Sun/Moon hoos. Casriyeen si aad u furto mawduucyo badan.
profile.backupTitle: Keydad Sir ah & Isku xidhka Qalabka
profile.backupDesc: Keydso furahaaga qarsoodinta si aad si ammaan ah u soo celiso farriimahaaga qalab kale.
profile.privacyBlurOnUnfocus: Blur marka app-ku aan la fiirsan
profile.planLoadFailed: Ku guuldareystay in la soo raro qorshahaaga.
profile.freePlanCopy: Waxaad ku jirtaa qorshaha bilaashka ah. Casriyeen si aad u furto astaamo badan sida keydad, lambarro dheeraad ah, iyo xulashooyinka asturnaanta horumarsan.
profile.portalOpenFailed: Lama furi karin bogga lacag-bixinta. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
profile.notifyOnCopy: I ogeysii haddii farriintayda la koobiyo
profile.loadFailed: Ku guuldareystay in la soo raro profile
profile.unfollowFailed: Ku guuldareystay in la joojiyo raacitaanka
profile.followHint: Sheekooyinkooda ayaa ka muuqan doona quudinta Raacayaashaada haddii ay dhigaan dhagaystayaal Raacayaasha (ama Dadweynaha).
profile.sectionCrashedTitle: Qaybtu way fashilantay in la soo raro
profile.callTextForwardingDescription: U gudbi wicitaannada iyo farriimaha soo galaya lambarkaaga taleefan ama email la xaqiijiyey. Wicitaannada/farriimaha bixiya waxay muujin karaan lambarkaaga Chatforia.
profile.forwardSaveFailed: Ku guuldareystay in la keydiyo dejinta
profile.errE164: Geli lambar taleefan E.164 sax ah (tusaale, +15551234567).
profile.errSmsDest: Dooro ugu yaraan hal meel loo socdo (taleefan ama email).
profile.errQuietHours: Saacadaha aamusan waa inay noqdaan 0 ilaa 23.
profile.ageBandHint: Waxaan kaydsanaynaa oo keliya xad da'deed (ma aha taariikhda dhalashadaada saxda ah). Tani waxaa loo isticmaalaa in lagu ilaaliyo isku xidhka Sheekaysi Random macquul ah.
profile.wantsAgeFilter: Isticmaal isku xidhka ku salaysan da'da ee Sheekaysi Random
profile.wantsAgeFilterDesc: Marka on, waxaan isku daynaa inaan ku xidho dadka xadka da'doodu ku habboon yihiin.
profile.partnerAgeBandsDesc: Dhallinyarada had iyo jeer waxaa lagu xidhaa oo keliya dhallinyaro kale. Dadka waaweyni lama xidhi karaan dhallinyarada.
profile.teenMatchingNote: Nabadgelyo awgeed, akoonnada da'da 13–17 waxay kaliya la xidhi karaan akoonnada 13–17 kale ee Sheekaysi Random.
profile.foriaRemember: U oggolow Ria inay xasuusato waxaad u sheegto
profile.foriaRememberDesc: Marka tani on tahay, Foria waxay isticmaali kartaa sheekaysiyadaadii hore ee Random Chat (kaliya adiga) si ay u sii socoto sheekaysiga. Waad dami kartaa wakhti kasta.
profile.voicemailAutoDeleteDays: Si otomaatig ah u tirtir voicemail ka dib (maalmood)
profile.voicemailAutoDeletePlaceholder: Ka tag madhan si aad u hayso weligeed
profile.voicemailGreetingTextDesc: La isticmaalo marka salaanta codkaaga aan la heli karin.
profile.voicemailGreetingUploaded: Salaanta voicemail si guul leh loo soo raray
profile.voicemailGreetingUploadError: Ku guuldareystay in la soo raro salaanta voicemail
profile.voicemailNote: Voicemail-ka lambarradaada Chatforia waxaa lagu kaydin doonaa sanduuqaaga Voicemail. Waad daarikartaa qoraal iyo forwarding qorshayaasha la taageero.
profile.portHint: Ma doonaysaa inaad haysto lambarkaaga hadda? Waad u gudbin kartaa Chatforia Wireless.

esim.title: Chatforia eSIM
esim.desc: Hel xog mobile ah Chatforia markaad ka maqn tahay Wi-Fi.

wireless.title: Chatforia Wireless
wireless.description: Maamul qorshahaaga mobile Chatforia, lambarrada, forwarding, iyo gudbinta lambarka.

options.heading: Dooro sida aad u isticmaali doonto Chatforia
options.subheading: Waad heli kartaa lambar Chatforia cusub, ama u keen lambarkaaga hadda ee ka yimaada shirkad kale.
options.portNumber: U gudbi lambarkaaga hadda Chatforia Wireless

port.heading: U gudbi lambarkaaga hadda
port.subheading: U rar lambarkaaga taleefan hadda ee shirkaddaada hadda Chatforia. Hubi in faahfaahintu ay la mid tahay akoontigaaga shirkadda si looga fogaado dib u dhac.
port.pinLabel: PIN / eray sirta ah ee port-out
port.success: Codsiga port la gudbiyey! Waanu ku ogeysiin doonnaa.

status.heading: Xaaladda porting
status.loadError: Ku guuldareystay in la soo raro codsiyada port.
status.none: Weli ma jiraan hawlo porting ah.

wireless.exhausted: Xogtaadu way dhammaatay. Iibso xirmo cusub si aad u sii waddo isticmaalka xogta mobile.

error.load: Ku guuldareystay in la soo raro faahfaahinta qoyska.
error.invite: Lama samayn karin martiqaad. Hubi inaad tahay milkiilaha qoyska oo isku day mar kale.
error.checkout: Lama bilaabi karin lacag-bixinta qorshaha Qoyska. Fadlan isku day mar kale.

billing.freePlanCopy: Waxaad ku jirtaa qorshaha bilaashka ah. Casriyeen si aad u furto astaamo badan.
billing.portalError: Lama furi karin bogga lacag-bixinta hadda.
billing.cancelNowHelp: Waad maamuli kartaa ama joojin kartaa rukunkaaga bogga lacag-bixinta, ama jooji markiiba hoos.
billing.cancelNowConfirm: Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad joojiso qorshahaaga markiiba? Tani lama rogi karo.
billing.cancelNowError: Lama joojin karin qorshahaaga hadda. Fadlan isku day mar kale ama isticmaal Maamul lacag-bixinta.

none.title: Weli lama samayn qoys
none.body: Si aad u samaysato Qoys Chatforia iyo barkad xog la wadaagto, bilow qorshaha Qoyska.

data.heading: Barkadda xogta la wadaagto
data.caption: Dhammaan xubnaha waxay wadaagaan barkaddan. Waxaan ku digi doonnaa markaad u dhowaato xadkaaga.

invite.title: Ku martiqaad xubin cusub
invite.body: Dir email ama xiriir si aad u martiqaaddo qof barkadda xogta qoyskaaga la wadaagto.
invite.expiryHint: Xiriirkani wuxuu dhacayaa dhawr maalmood ka dib. Had iyo jeer waad samayn kartaa mid cusub.

join.title: Ku biir qoys
join.body: Waxaa lagugu martiqaaday inaad ku biirto Qoys Chatforia oo aad la wadaagto barkadda xogtooda.
join.success: Waxaad ku biirtay qoyskan. Hadda waxaad la wadaagtaa barkadda xogtooda.
join.error: Lama kugu darin karin qoyskan. Martiqaadku wuxuu noqon karaa mid aan sax ahayn ama dhacay.

premium.heading: Ku bax Premium
premium.description: Fur astaamo awood leh & ka saar xayeysiisyada.

upgrade.title: Casriyeen
upgrade.h1Subtitle: Ku bilow qorshahaaga bilaashka ah ee xayeysiiska leh. Noqo xayeysiis la'aan Plus, ama fur astaamo awood buuxa leh Premium.
upgrade.subtitle: Dooro qorshe app, ku dar xirmooyin xog ah naftaada, ama la wadaag xogta qoyskaaga — dhammaan hal meel.
upgrade.subtitle.app: Ku bilow qorshahaaga bilaashka ah ee xayeysiiska leh. Noqo xayeysiis la'aan Plus, ama fur astaamo awood buuxa leh Premium.
upgrade.subtitle.mobile: Ku dar xog eSIM caalami ah si Chatforia u sii shaqeyso xitaa markaad ka maqn tahay Wi-Fi.
upgrade.subtitle.family: Samee barkad xog la wadaagto qoyskaaga oo maamul isticmaalka qof walba hal meel.
upgrade.benefitsLine: Fur astaamo awood leh & ka saar xayeysiisyada.

free.title: Bilaash
free.desc: Ku bilow farriimaha bilaash. Ku habboon haddii aad kaliya tijaabinayso Chatforia.

features.chat: Sheekaysi 1:1 iyo koox waqti-dhab ah, oo ay ku jiraan wicitaano cod iyo muuqaal
features.media: La wadaag sawirro, farriimo cod, iyo muuqaallo gaagaaban
features.ai: Jawaabo smart oo AI ku shaqeeya iyo tarjumaad degdeg ah (isticmaal macquul ah)
features.disappearing: Fariimo baaba’aya iyo xakamaynta asturnaanta aasaasiga ah
features.ads: Bilaash weligeed oo leh xayeysiisyo app-ka dhexdiisa

plus.title: Plus
plus.desc: Dhammaan muhiimka ah, xayeysiis la'aan. Ku habboon farriimaha iyo wicitaannada maalinlaha ah.

features.allFree: Wax kasta oo Bilaash ah, xayeysiis la'aan
features.forwarding: U gudbi wicitaannada iyo farriimaha lambarkaaga taleefan dhab ah
features.support: Taageero degdeg ah marka wax khaldan yihiin

premiumMonthly.title: Premium (Bishii)
premiumMonthly.desc: Khibradda Chatforia buuxda: Qalabyada AI, habaynta, iyo taageero mudnaan leh.

features.themes: Fur dhammaan mawduucyada midabka premium iyo habaynta app
features.ai: Qalabyada AI ee Premium-kaliya ee dib-u-qorista, jawaabaha smart, iyo koobitaannada
features.support: Taageero mudnaan leh marka aad u baahan tahay caawimo ugu badan

premiumAnnual.title: Premium (Sannadle)
premiumAnnual.desc: Keydso in badan marka la bixiyo sannadkii — oo ay ku jiraan mawduucyo midab dheeraad ah, qalabyada AI, iyo taageero mudnaan leh.

features.allPremium: Wax kasta oo Premium Bishii ah — oo ay ku jiraan mawduucyo midab dheeraad ah
features.save25: Keydso qiyaastii 30% marka loo eego bixinta bishii
features.bestFor: Ku habboon isticmaalayaasha xoogga leh, shaqaalaha fog, iyo socdaalayaasha culus

premiumAnnual.disclaimer: Hal mar la bixiyaa. Jooji wakhti kasta. Ma jiraan khidado qarsoon.

marketing.plusDesc: Khibradda xayeysiis-la'aanta ah ee ugu jaban.
marketing.premiumMonthlyDesc: Astaamo buuxa, dhawaaqyo, iyo qalabyada AI.
marketing.premiumAnnualDesc: Keydso in badan marka la bixiyo sannadkii.
marketing.annualDisclaimer: Hal mar la bixiyaa. Jooji wakhti kasta. Ma jiraan khidado qarsoon.

mobile.title: Chatforia Mobile (xirmooyinka xogta eSIM)
mobile.subtitle: Ku dar xog caalami ah si Chatforia u sii shaqeyso xitaa iyadoo aan Wi-Fi lahayn. Qiimaha si otomaatig ah ayuu u isbeddelaa iyadoo lagu saleynayo waddankaaga iyo lacagtaada.
mobile.subtitle.detail: Dooro xirmo xog caalami ah oo hal mar ah si Chatforia u sii shaqeyso markaad socoto ama ka maqan tahay Wi-Fi.
mobile.note: Ma iibinno xirmooyin xog ah oo ka yar 3 GB.

features.heavyUse: Xog xawaare sare leh oo loogu talagalay isticmaalka culus
features.throttle: Xawaaruhu wuu yara dhimi karaa ka dib isticmaalka sare
features.noContract: Xirmo hal mar ah, qandaraas la'aan

disclaimer.devices: Xirmooyinka xogta eSIM waxay u baahan yihiin qalab eSIM-ku-habboon oo la furay. Helitaanku wuxuu ku kala duwan yahay nooca taleefanka, shirkadda, iyo waddanka. Daboolidda iyo xawaaruhu way ku kala duwan yihiin gobolka.

small.title: Xirmo bilow ah
small.desc: Waxaa ku jira 3 GB xog xawaare sare leh — ku habboon farriimaha fudud iyo wicitaanno marmar ah.
small.bestFor: Safarro gaagaaban, farriimo fudud, iyo wicitaanno marmar ah
small.aria: Iibso xirmo xog eSIM bilow ah

medium.title: Xirmo socdaale
medium.desc: Waxaa ku jira 5 GB xog xawaare sare leh safarro, socdaal, iyo wicitaanno VoIP caadi ah.
medium.bestFor: Safarro dhammaadka toddobaadka, wicitaanno VoIP caadi ah, iyo khariidado

large.title: Xirmo awood leh
large.desc: Waxaa ku jira 10 GB xog xawaare sare leh sheekaysi culus, wicitaanno, iyo muuqaal shabakadda Chatforia.
large.bestFor: Sheekaysi culus, wicitaanno, muuqaal, iyo isticmaalka hotspot
large.aria: Iibso xirmo xog eSIM isticmaale awood leh

compare.title: Is barbar dhig xirmooyinka xogta eSIM
compare.disclaimer: Isticmaalka xogta dhabta ah waxay ku xidhan tahay sida aad u isticmaasho Chatforia (cod, muuqaal, warbaahin, iyo app-yada kale ee taleefankaaga).

family.title: Qoyska Chatforia (xog la wadaagto)
family.subtitle: La wadaag barkad xog hal ah qoyskaaga. Hal biil, akoonno Chatforia badan, daboolid caalami ah.

small.title: Qoyska Yaryar
small.desc: Waxaa ku jira 20 GB xog xawaare sare leh oo la wadaago — ku habboon 2–3 isticmaaleyaal fudud.

medium.title: Qoyska Dhexdhexaad
medium.desc: Waxaa ku jira 40 GB xog xawaare sare leh oo la wadaago — ku habboon 3–5 xubnood firfircoon.

large.title: Qoyska Weyn
large.desc: Waxaa ku jira 80 GB xog xawaare sare leh oo la wadaago — loogu talagalay qoysaska awoodda leh ee had iyo jeer online ah.

feature.shared: Barkadda xogta la wadaagto ee qoyskaaga
feature.members: Ku martiqaad ilaa 4 xubnood oo dheeraad ah
feature.topUp: Ku dar xirmooyin dheeraad ah wakhti kasta
feature.fairUse: Ku xidhan siyaasadda isticmaalka macquulka ah iyo xadka maxalliga ah

family.disclaimer: Xirmooyinka qoyska waxay abuuraan ama buuxiyaan barkad xog la wadaagto. Waad martiqaadi kartaa oo ka saari kartaa xubnaha wakhti kasta.
family.footnote: Xirmooyinka qoyska waxay la wadaagaan barkad xog hal ah akoonnada Chatforia ee xidhan. Helitaanka iyo xadku waxay ku xidhan yihiin waddankaaga iyo xeerarka maxalliga ah.

why.title: Sababta dadku u beddelaan Chatforia
why.subtitle: Chatforia waxay ku siinaysaa lambar taleefan dhab ah, tarjumaad smart, iyo waddo cad oo aad u noqonayso xayeysiis la'aan markaad diyaar tahay.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Xayeysiisyo fudud oo Bilaash ah, casriyeyn Plus fudud markaad diyaar tahay, iyo qalabyo Premium oo TextNow aan bixin.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: App casri ah, naqshad caalami-koowaad, iyo tarjumaad ku dhex jirta halkii loo gudbin lahaa wicitaannada duugoobay.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs app-yada sheekaysiga
messengers.body: Farriimo lambarro taleefan dhab ah — ma aha kaliya isticmaalayaasha app-yada kale — oo leh AI iyo xaalad ku dhex jirta. Ku habboon haddii aad ka imanayso app-yada sida TextFree ama TextMe.

feature.translation: Tarjumaad otomaatig ah oo ku dhex jirta

why.disclaimer: Is barbar dhigga waxaa ku salaysan xogta si cad loo heli karo waxaana laga yaabaa inay isbeddesho waqti ka dib. App-yada kale ee farriimaha bilaashka ah sida TextFree ama TextMe guud ahaan waxay la mid yihiin TextNow.

faq.title: Su'aalaha la is weydiiyo ee Qiimaha & qorshayaasha

free.q: Ma runtii bilaash baa qorshaha Bilaashka ah?
free.a: Haa. Qorshaha Bilaashka ah waxaa ku jira lambar Chatforia, wicitaanno, iyo farriimo oo leh xayeysiisyo. Waad sii joogi kartaa Bilaash intaad doonayso, ama casriyeen si aad u ka saarto xayeysiisyada oo aad u furto astaamo badan.

plusPremium.q: Maxaa farqi ah oo u dhexeeya Plus iyo Premium?
plusPremium.a: Plus waxay ka saartaa xayeysiisyada waxayna kordhisaa taariikhda farriimahaada — ku habboon isticmaalka maalinlaha ah. Premium waxay ku daraysaa habayn dheeraad ah, qalabyada AI ee dib-u-qorista iyo jawaabaha, iyo taageero mudnaan leh isticmaalayaasha culus.

esim.q: Xagee ayay ka shaqeeyaan xirmooyinka xogta eSIM?
esim.a: Chatforia Mobile waxay isticmaashaa daboolid eSIM caalami ah. Helitaanku wuxuu ku xidhan yahay waddankaaga iyo qalabkaaga. Waxaad arki doontaa xulashooyinka la taageero inta lagu jiro dhaqaajinta app-ka dhexdiisa.

cancel.q: Ma joojin karaa ama beddeli karaa qorshayaasha wakhti kasta?
cancel.a: Haa. Waad maamuli kartaa ama joojin kartaa rukunkaaga bogga lacag-bixinta ee app-ka dhexdiisa. Isbeddelladu waxay dhaqan gelayaan dhammaadka xilliga lacag-bixinta hadda.

family.q: Sidee ayay u shaqeeyaan xirmooyinka Qoyska?
family.a: Xirmooyinka Qoyska waxay abuuraan barkad xog la wadaagto akoonno Chatforia badan. Hal qof ayaa bixiya biilka, waxaadna martiqaadi kartaa ama ka saari kartaa xubnaha oo aad dejin kartaa xad qof kasta.

gettingStarted.title: Sida loo bilaabo
gettingStarted.subtitle: Ma cusub tahay Chatforia? Tilmaantan degdegga ah waxay muujinaysaa muhiimada si aad u noqoto mid wax soo saar leh daqiiqado gudahood.

alert.text: Tilmaantan waxay kori doontaa markaan bilowno astaamo cusub. Haddii wax ka maqan yahay, noo sheeg

section2.title: 2) Bilow farriimaha
section2.item1: Samee DM ama Koox oo dir farriintaada ugu horreysa.
section2.item2: Isticmaal tarjumaad degdeg ah si aad u sheekaysato 100+ luqadood.
section2.item3: Isku day fariimo baaba’aya iyo warbixinta akhriska Profile → Asturnaanta.

section3.title: 3) Horay u soco
section3.item1: Waad casriyeen kartaa qorshe lacag leh wakhti kasta app-ka dhexdiisa.
section3.item2: Markaad saxiixato, waad xidhi karin kartaa qalabyo dheeraad ah oo aad dejin kartaa keydad qarsoon Settings app-ka dhexdiisa.

account.q: Sidee aan u sameeyaa ama u soo ceshadaa akoontayga?
account.a: Soo deji app-ka ama isticmaal web, taabo “Samee akoon”, xaqiiji emailkaaga/taleefankaaga. Si aad u soo ceshato, isticmaal “Ma ilowday erayga sirta ah”.

privacy.a: Haa. Farriimaha iyo wicitaannadu waa qarsoon yihiin dhammaad-ilaa-dhammaad caadi ahaan. Adiga iyo qaataha kaliya ayaa akhriyi kara.

translate.q: Sidee ayay u shaqeysaa tarjumaadda degdegga ah?
translate.a: Daar “Tarjumaad otomaatig ah” Settings → Muuqaalka & Luqadda. Waxaan ku turjunaa qalabka dhexdiisa meesha la taageero, haddii kale API-yo ammaan ah oo leh xog yar.

contact.a: Nala xidhiidh support@chatforia.com. Ku dar sawirro iyo nooca app-kaaga.

contact.title: Nala xidhiidh
contact.successMsg: Mahadsanid — kooxdayadu waxay kugu soo jawaabi doontaa email.
contact.errorSend: Lama diri karin. Fadlan email u dir support@chatforia.com.

intro.body: Siyaasaddan Asturnaanta waxay sharxaysaa sida Chatforia (“annaga”, “annaga”) u ururiso, u isticmaasho, oo u wadaagto xogta marka aad isticmaasho app-yada iyo adeegyada. Waxaan u qaabeynaa Chatforia si aan u yarayno xogta aan heli karno.

infoWeCollect.title: Xogta aan ururinno
infoWeCollect.account: Xog akoon (tusaale email/taleefan) si loo sameeyo oo loo sugo akoontaada.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Nuxurka qarsoon (farriimaha/wicitaannada) waa qarsoon dhammaad-ilaa-dhammaad; ma akhriyi karno.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Qaladaadka/isticmaalka sida logs-ka burburka, nooca qalabka, ama falanqaynta guud si loo wanaajiyo waxqabadka.

sms.title: Lambarrada taleefanka mobile iyo SMS
sms.body: Haddii aad doorato inaad bixiso lambar taleefan mobile, waxaan u isticmaalnaa si aan u furo astaamo sida xaqiijinta akoonta, ogeysiisyada galitaanka, iyo farriimaha isticmaale-ilaa-isticmaale iyada oo loo marayo SMS meesha la taageero. Waxaan u diri karnaa farriimo SMS ah oo la xidhiidha akoontaada iyo hawsha Chatforia. Waad joojin kartaa helitaanka farriimaha SMS wakhti kasta adiga oo ku jawaabaya eray joojin ah oo la taageero (sida “STOP”) ama adiga oo beddelaya doorashooyinka ogeysiiskaaga app-ka dhexdiisa. Ma iibinno lambarkaaga taleefan mana u isticmaalno suuq-geyn aan la xidhiidhin.
sms.addRecipient: Ku dar qof la xidhiidhinayo kor si aad u bilowdo…

howWeUse.title: Sida aan u isticmaalno xogta
howWeUse.provide: Bixi oo sugo adeegga (xaqiijin, ogaanshaha spam/dhibka).

sharing.title: Wadaagista
sharing.body: Ma iibinno xog shakhsi ah. Waxaan la wadaagi karnaa xog xaddidan processors (tusaale ogeysiisyada push, falanqaynta) iyada oo la raacayo heshiisyo adag.

rights.title: Xuquuqdaada
rights.body: Iyadoo ku xidhan gobolkaaga (tusaale GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), waxaad codsan kartaa helitaan, sixid, tirtirid, ama joojin habayn gaar ah. La xidhiidh: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Haynta xogta & amniga
retention.body: Waxaan haynaa oo keliya waxa loo baahan yahay si loo maamulo adeegga oo aan u adeegno amniga heerka warshadaha. Nuxurka E2E lama furin karo annaga.

children.title: Carruurta
children.body: Chatforia looguma talogelin carruurta ka yar 13 (ama sida looga baahan yahay sharcigaaga maxalliga ah).

changes.title: Isbeddellada
changes.body: Waxaan halkan ku dhejin doonnaa cusboonaysiin waxaana dib u eegayn doonnaa taariikhda “Markii ugu dambeysay la cusboonaysiiyey”.

contact.title: La xidhiidh
contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

intro.body: Markaad isticmaasho Chatforia waxaad ogolaatay shuruucdan. Haddii aadan ogolayn, ha isticmaalin adeegga.

accounts.title: Akoonnada
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Bixi xog sax ah oo ilaali aqoonsiyadaada ammaan.
accounts.itemResponsibility: Adiga ayaa mas'uul ka ah hawsha akoontaaga.

acceptableUse.title: Isticmaalka la aqbali karo
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: Ma jiro nuxur sharci darro ah, dhib ah, ama ku xadgudbaya; ma jiro spam ama dhib otomaatig ah.
acceptableUse.itemSuspend: Waxaan laga yaabaa inaan hakino/joojino xadgudubyada.

sms.title: Isgaarsiinta SMS
sms.body: Haddii aad bixiso lambar taleefan mobile, waxaad ogolaatay in Chatforia kuu soo dirto farriimo SMS ah oo la xidhiidha akoontaada iyo isticmaalka adeegga, sida ogeysiisyada galitaanka, ogeysiisyada amniga, iyo farriimaha la xidhiidha sheekaysiyada aad bilowdo ama ka qayb qaadatid. Ma isticmaalno SMS suuq-geyn ama xayeysiin iyada oo aan ogolaansho gaar ah lahayn. Qiimaha farriinta caadiga ah iyo xogta ayaa laga yaabaa inay khusayso. Waad joojin kartaa farriimaha SMS wakhti kasta adiga oo ku jawaabaya eray joojin ah oo la taageero (tusaale “STOP”) ama adiga oo cusboonaysiinaya dejinta ogeysiiskaaga app-ka dhexdiisa.

yourContent.title: Nuxurkaaga
yourContent.body: Waxaad haysataa xuquuqda nuxurkaaga. Waxaad noo siinaysaa xuquuqda lagama maarmaanka ah si aan u maamulno adeegga (tusaale routing, kaydinta, tarjumaadda).

disclaimer.title: Diidmo & mas'uuliyad
disclaimer.body: Adeegga waxaa loo bixiyaa “sida uu yahay” iyada oo aan dammaanad lahayn. Inta ugu badan ee sharciga loo oggol yahay, Chatforia ma mas'uul ka ahaan doonto khasaarooyinka dadka kale ama natiijada.

changes.title: Isbeddellada
changes.body: Waxaan laga yaabaa inaan cusboonaysiino shuruucdan; sii wad isticmaalka ka dib isbeddellada macnaheedu waa aad ogolaatay.

contact.title: La xidhiidh
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

doNotSell.title: Ha Iibin ama La Wadaagin Xogta Shakhsi ahaaneed
doNotSell.body: Chatforia ma iibiso xog shakhsi ah. Dadka deggan California waxay weli soo gudbin karaan codsiyo CPRA iyaga oo isticmaalaya badhanka hoose.

cookies.title: Dejinta Cookie
cookies.body: Chatforia waxay isticmaashaa cookie-yo yar (tusaale kalfadhiga, amniga). Ma isticmaalno cookie-yo xayeysiis saddexaad. Maamul cookie-yada adiga oo isticmaalaya dejinta browser-kaaga.

phoneNumberManager.unableToLoadStatus: Lama soo rari karin xaaladda lambarka taleefanka.
phoneNumberManager.noNumberAssigned: Lambar lama qoondeeyey. Dooro lambar ayaa code ahaan si aad u bilowdo farriimaha.

startChatModal.title: Bilow sheekaysi
startChatModal.nameUsernamePhoneEmail: Qor magac, magaca isticmaalaha, lambar taleefan, ama email…
startChatModal.searchByUsernameOrPhone: Raadi magaca isticmaalaha ama lambarka taleefanka
startChatModal.searchPrompt: Qor magaca isticmaalaha ama lambarka taleefanka oo riix Raadi.
startChatModal.pickAtLeastOne: Dooro ugu yaraan hal qof la xidhiidhinayo.
startChatModal.saveContactsHint: Gelinta taleefan/email waxay diyaar noqon doontaa ka dib markaad u keydiso xidhiidh ahaan.
startChatModal.failedBulkStart: Ku guuldareystay in la bilaabo sheekaysi dadka la doortay.
startChatModal.firstMessageOptional: Farriinta ugu horreysa (ikhtiyaari laakiin lagu taliyey)

sounds.freeNotice: Waxaad ku jirtaa Bilaash — dhawaaqyada premium waa la muujiyey laakiin la xidhay. Casriyeen si aad u furto dhammaan.

premiumGuard.requiresPremium: Astaamadan waxay u baahan tahay qorshe Premium.

aiSettings.title: Dejinta AI
aiSettings.controlIntro: Xakamee tarjumaadda, jawaabaha smart, iyo jawaabaha otomaatig ah ee ForiaBot.
aiSettings.autoTranslateIncoming: Si otomaatig ah u turjun farriimaha soo galaya
aiSettings.showOriginalAlongside: Muuji qoraalka asalka ah oo ay la socoto tarjumaadda
aiSettings.smartRepliesHint: Dir farriimaha la helay ee ugu dambeeyey (la nadiifiyey) AI si ay u soo jeediso jawaabo degdeg ah.
aiSettings.maskProfanityHint: Haddii on, soojeedinta ay soo celiso AI waxay leedahay ereyo calaamadeeyey oo la daboolay
aiSettings.enableAutoReply: Daar jawaab otomaatig ah markaan mashquul ahay
aiSettings.saveFailed: Ku guuldareystay in la keydiyo dejinta AI

accessibilitySettings.title: Helitaanka & Ogeysiisyada
accessibilitySettings.accessibilityDesc: Xulashooyinka si loo fududeeyo isticmaalka Chatforia iyada oo aan lagu tiirsanayn codka.
accessibilitySettings.interfaceFontSizeHelp: Waxay ka bilaabataa cabbir caadi ah. Kordhi haddii aad doorbidayso qoraal weyn dejinta helitaanka.
accessibilitySettings.notificationsDesc:
Ogeysiisyo muuqaal ah farriimaha & wicitaannada
Muuji banners iyo dhalaal cinwaan si aad u daawan weydo hawsha.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNew:
Gariir farriimo cusub (marka la taageero)
Kici gariirka qalabka ogeysiisyada.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCall:
Dhalaal shaashadda wicitaan soo galaya
Dhalaal dhalaal ah oo gaaban marka wicitaan la garaaco.
accessibilitySettings.autoTranscribeVoiceNotes: Si otomaatig ah u qor qoraallo cod
accessibilitySettings.autoTranscribeVoiceNotesDesc: Ku lifaaq qoraal farriimaha codka aad hesho.
accessibilitySettings.loadFailed: Ku guuldareystay in la soo raro dejinta
accessibilitySettings.visualAlertsDesc: Muuji banners iyo dhalaal cinwaan si aad u daawan weydo hawsha.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallDesc: Dhalaal dhalaal ah oo gaaban marka wicitaan la garaaco.

privacySection.ciphertextOnlyNote: Keydso oo keliya ciphertext server-ka. Waxay damisaa AI/Tarjumaad iyo horudhacyada dhexdhexaadinta.

peoplePage.searchPlaceholder: Raadi alias, magac, magaca isticmaalaha, ama lambar taleefan
peoplePage.quickStartDesc: Dhowr siyaabood oo degdeg ah oo lagu bilaabo.
peoplePage.inviteDesc: La wadaag xiriirkaaga martiqaad si aad si degdeg ah u bilowdo sheekaysiga.
peoplePage.getTheAppDesc: La xidhiidh intaad socoto oo leh Chatforia iOS iyo Android.
peoplePage.syncTip: Talo: Farriimahaagu way isku xidhan yihiin web iyo mobile.

randomChat.title: Sheekaysi Random
randomChat.description: La kulan qof cusub markiiba. Waxaan ku xidhi doonnaa oo furin doonnaa qol sheekaysi ku meel gaar ah. Marka hore si qarsoodi ah u sheekayso. Ku dar saaxiib haddii ay sax tahay.
randomChat.partnerDisconnected: Qofkaaga wada sheekaysiga ayaa ka baxay.
randomChat.partnerLeft: Qofka wada sheekaysiga ayaa ka tagay.
randomChat.saveGuard: Kaliya sheekaysiyo qof-ilaa-qof ayaa la keydin karaa
randomChat.ageDisclaimer: Waxaan kaydsanaynaa oo keliya xad da'deed (ma aha taariikhda dhalashadaada saxda ah). Tani waxaa loo isticmaalaa in lagu ilaaliyo isku xidhka Sheekaysi Random macquul ah. Si aad ula xidhiidho dadka (ma aha kaliya RiaBot), deji xadka da'daada Settings → Da'da & Sheekaysi Random.
randomChat.ageBandRequired: Deji xadka da'daada Profile → Da'da & Sheekaysi Random si lagugu xidho dadka.
randomChat.ageBandCallout: Si aad ula xidhiidho dadka (ma aha kaliya RiaBot), deji xadka da'daada Settings → Da'da & Sheekaysi Random.
randomChat.subtitle: La kulan qof cusub markiiba, ama dooro inaad la sheekaysato Ria.
randomChat.setAge: Deji xadka da'daada Profile → Da'da & Sheekaysi Random si lagugu xidho dadka.
